title: rhododendron × filidactylis
intro: Rhododendron × filidactylis, also known as the Rhododendron hybrid, is a cross between the Rhododendron ponticum and the Rhododendron luteum, resulting in a flowering evergreen shrub. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron × filidactylis include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are typically made from its flowers and leaves, which are said to possess a range of medicinal properties.
